TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kenny_Battle, title = Kenny_Battle, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kenny_Battle} }

S.FORM: Kenny Battle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Kenny Battle, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kenny Battle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 10, Kenny Battle, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kennj βattle s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, kennj βattle, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
